finding_results.notes: Removed same-scene paid re-entry path. Marisol now leaves with no paid Cypress hours, only unpaid probationary conditions and a future conduct review that explicitly does not guarantee reinstatement.
Added direct accountability dialogue with an affected youth and guardian, including concrete consequences (deadline damage, unresolved draft quality, paid transit cost, and wasted travel time).
Inserted a sustained post-confession paragraph of embodied social discomfort before logistics resume, including public tension, bodily stress cues, and unresolved relational friction.
Preserved the throat-closure dry-heave anchor and intensified nearby physical specificity (acid burn, tendon spasms, swallow rebound) to keep this chapter as the canonical somatic instance.

summary: All packet findings were addressed in-place: the relapse aftermath is more physically specific, post-admission discomfort now lingers on-page, direct youth/guardian harm is dramatized with practical fallout, and the chapter exits with unresolved external conditions rather than immediate paid re-entry.
